Setlist
Venue Info
Media Gallery
Cleveland Convention Center
Cleveland, OH
Seating Capacity: 3000
Venue Type : Auditorium

Total Gigs: 1
  DMB  (1)

Longest Performance:
03.04.95 - Seek Up (12:51)
Description
The Music Hall was an area located within the Cleveland Convention Center. Also within the center were Public Hall, Music Hall, Little Theater, and exhibit halls and ballrooms.

The center was demolished in 2011 and replaced with the Huntington Convention Center.
